zh.Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼

zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillipa Hungerford於大約1433年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼時，她的父親Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford25歲，母親Margaret Botreaux22歲。她和Sir Thomas Seymour至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1478年2月7日在英國薩默塞特福洛享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillipa Hungerford于大约1433年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼时，她的父亲Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford25岁，母亲Margaret Botreaux22岁。她和Sir Thomas Seymour至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1478年2月7日在英国薩默塞特福洛享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Phillipa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Phyllis , derived from the genitive case (Greek Phyllidos, Latin Phyllidis) with the addition of the Latin feminine ending -a.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillipa Hungerford was born about 1433, in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Botreaux, was 22. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sir Thomas Seymour. She died on 7 February 1478, in Frome, Somerset, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillipa Hungerford est née environ 1433, à Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Botreaux, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Thomas Seymour. Elle est décédée le 7 février 1478, à Frome, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phillipa Hungerford um 1433 in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Botreaux 22. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas Seymour mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Februar 1478 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Frome, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phillipa Hungerford è nata il circa 1433 nel Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Botreaux, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sir Thomas Seymour. Morì il 7 febbraio 1478, nel Frome, Somerset, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillipa Hungerfordが約1433年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダウン アンプニーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerfordは25歳，母Margaret Botreauxは22歳であった。彼女はSir Thomas Seymourとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1478年2月7日にイギリスソメルセトフロメで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillipa Hungerford(이)가 대략 1433년 영국 그루스스터실르 다운 아p니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Botreaux(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Seymour(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 2월 7일 영국 서머세트 프롬에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillipa Hungerford nasceu aproximadamente 1433, em Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Botreaux, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Sir Thomas Seymour. Ela faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1478, em Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillipa Hungerford родилась около 1433 г. в местности доун ампни, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Botreaux, 22. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sir Thomas Seymour. Она умерла 7 февраля 1478 г. в местности фром, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phillipa Hungerford nació aproximadamente 1433, en Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Botreaux, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Sir Thomas Seymour. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1478, en Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
